headline: Auna S.A.'s Risk-Sharing Strategy in Colombia Supports Revenue Growth
summary: AUNA leans on risk-sharing models in Colombia, boosting revenues and cash flow while reducing exposure to government-intervened payors.

raw.headline: Auna S.A.'s Risk-Sharing Strategy in Colombia Supports Revenue Growth

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Labcorp Holdings, Raises Price Target to $300
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Elizabeth Anderson   maintains Labcorp Holdings (NYSE:LH) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $280 to $300.
